title: Craft & Crumb Teddy Bear Cookies Bake & Craft Kit with Baking apron, Utensils and Cookery book - Annabel Karmel Collaboration Bundle
features: 🍪 TEDDY BEAR CRAFT BUNDLE: Step into the fun world of baking with our adorable Teddy Bear Biscuit Bake & Craft Kit! This kit combines delicious biscuit-making with hands-on creativity, perfect for young bakers and their families. The bundle includes everything needed to create and decorate charming teddy bear-shaped biscuits.

🎉 PERFECT FOR FAMILY FUN: Whether it's for playdates, sleepovers, or a cozy family baking session, this kit is designed to spark creativity and bring joy. It’s a great way to keep kids entertained and engaged, making delightful treats while creating special memories together.

👩‍🍳 INCLUDED IN THE BUNDLE : The bundle comes with a children’s apron, a rolling pin, biscuit cutters, baking mix for creating the teddy bear biscuits, and Annabel Karmel’s "Fun, Fast & Easy" children’s cookbook, ensuring fun doesn’t stop at just one baking session!

🌱 SUSTAINABLY SOURCED QUALITY INGREDIENTS: We pride ourselves on using locally sourced raw ingredients to produce our biscuit mixes. Each mix is crafted with a no hidden additives, preservatives, or 'nasties' guarantee, ensuring deliciousness you can trust.

🌎 ENVIRONMENTALLY SUSTAINABLE GIFTING: From reducing single and limited use plastic in our party bags, to using recyclable, compostable and FSC certified packaging, we are committed to reducing our carbon footprint and to provide families with opportunities to create and bake memories, not landfill.

🍪 ABOUT CRAFT & CRUMB: We are proud to say we are an award-winning baking and crafting company. We have a fabulous range of baking kits, celebration kits and party bags that all make amazing gifts but are also perfect for an entertaining experience as a family.
